nodes.label: Multi-Agent RAG Chatbot — A LangGraph-orchestrated multi-agent system with FastAPI serving layer, RAG-powered portfolio search, and MCP-based GitHub/Mindmap tool integrations. The assistant agent acts as a smart router, delegating to a specialist agent for public repository deep-dives while answering private portfolio questions via vector search. Structured output with Pydantic schemas ensures consistent JSON responses with follow-up suggestions.
nodes.type: architecture

metadata.pattern: Multi-Agent RAG Chatbot — A LangGraph-orchestrated multi-agent system with FastAPI serving layer, RAG-powered portfolio search, and MCP-based GitHub/Mindmap tool integrations. The assistant agent acts as a smart router, delegating to a specialist agent for public repository deep-dives while answering private portfolio questions via vector search. Structured output with Pydantic schemas ensures consistent JSON responses with follow-up suggestions.

nodes.label: Application Bootstrap
nodes.type: layer

metadata.description: The application entry point and service wiring layer. Defines the FastAPI app factory with an async lifespan that orchestrates the full initialization: creates embedding/RAG services, connects MCP clients, builds catalogs, compiles the LangGraph workflow, and attaches all shared state.

nodes.label: main.py
nodes.type: Application entry point — FastAPI app factory with lifespan initialization, MCP client bootstrap, and service wiring.

metadata.role: Application entry point — FastAPI app factory with lifespan initialization, MCP client bootstrap, and service wiring.
metadata.description: The central orchestrator that wires every subsystem together at startup: creates the embedding service, RAG service, MCP clients (GitHub + Mindmap), builds the portfolio search tool, loads private/public catalogs, compiles the LangGraph workflow, and exposes the FastAPI app with CORS and health endpoint.

nodes.label: Multi-Agent Orchestration
nodes.type: layer

metadata.description: The LangGraph-based workflow engine defining the multi-agent topology. Contains the state graph builder with three nodes (assistant, tools, specialist) and conditional routing functions that implement the handoff protocol. The graph state tracks conversation messages, active node, and structured response payload.

nodes.label: graph.py
nodes.type: LangGraph state graph builder — Defines the multi-agent workflow topology with conditional routing functions.

metadata.role: LangGraph state graph builder — Defines the multi-agent workflow topology with conditional routing functions.
metadata.description: Constructs the LangGraph StateGraph with three nodes (assistant, tools, specialist) and three conditional routers (chat_router, tool_router, agent_router). The graph flow is: START → assistant → chat_router → (tools/END), tools → tool_router → (specialist/assistant), specialist → agent_router → (tools/END).

nodes.label: state.py
nodes.type: LangGraph state schema — TypedDict defining shared conversation state with message accumulation, node tracking, and response payload.

metadata.role: LangGraph state schema — TypedDict defining shared conversation state with message accumulation, node tracking, and response payload.

nodes.label: output_schema.py
nodes.type: Pydantic structured output schema — Defines ChatTurnOutput with answer text and up to 3 follow-up suggestions.

metadata.role: Pydantic structured output schema — Defines ChatTurnOutput with answer text and up to 3 follow-up suggestions.

nodes.label: Agent Nodes
nodes.type: domain

metadata.description: The intelligent agent layer implementing a two-agent handoff pattern. AssistantNode acts as the primary router — answering private portfolio questions via RAG search and delegating public repo deep-dives to SpecialistNode. Both extend BaseAgentNode which provides structured output invocation with ChatTurnOutput schema.

nodes.label: assistant.py
nodes.type: Primary user-facing assistant agent — Routes queries between portfolio search and specialist handoff based on routing rules.

metadata.role: Primary user-facing assistant agent — Routes queries between portfolio search and specialist handoff based on routing rules.
metadata.description: Extends BaseAgentNode with a comprehensive system prompt defining routing rules: private portfolio questions use search_portfolio, public repo deep-dives trigger handoff_to_specialist, and private code requests are refused. Receives runtime context with private_portfolio_catalog and public_repo_catalog.

nodes.label: specialist.py
nodes.type: Technical specialist agent — Handles public GitHub repository analysis using mindmap and get_file_contents tools.

metadata.role: Technical specialist agent — Handles public GitHub repository analysis using mindmap and get_file_contents tools.
metadata.description: Extends BaseAgentNode with a system prompt enforcing the 'Survey the map before walking the path' strategy: first mindmap.overview for big picture, then mindmap.find for specific queries, and only then get_file_contents for code evidence.

nodes.label: base_agent.py
nodes.type: Abstract base class for agent nodes — Provides structured output invocation via LLM with_structured_output and tool call detection.

metadata.role: Abstract base class for agent nodes — Provides structured output invocation via LLM with_structured_output and tool call detection.
metadata.description: Defines the BaseAgentNode ABC that both AssistantNode and SpecialistNode inherit from. Manages LLM binding with structured output (ChatTurnOutput), handles dual path of tool_calls vs. parsed structured responses, and provides system prompt composition with optional runtime_context injection.

nodes.label: __init__.py
nodes.type: Python package init — Makes src/agents/ a Python package.

metadata.role: Python package init — Makes src/agents/ a Python package.

nodes.label: API Layer
nodes.type: layer

metadata.description: FastAPI-based REST API serving the chatbot interface. Provides synchronous /chat endpoint and /chat/stream with NDJSON for real-time token streaming. AnswerStreamExtractor performs character-level JSON parsing to extract the 'answer' field from partial LLM chunks.

nodes.label: routes.py
nodes.type: FastAPI route handlers — Exposes /chat and /chat/stream endpoints with dependency injection.

metadata.role: FastAPI route handlers — Exposes /chat and /chat/stream endpoints with dependency injection.
metadata.description: Defines the API router with two POST endpoints: /chat returns a full ChatResponse after graph.ainvoke, /chat/stream uses graph.astream with NDJSON event generation for real-time answer streaming.

nodes.label: schemas.py
nodes.type: API request/response Pydantic models — ChatRequest, ChatResponse, and Source schemas.

metadata.role: API request/response Pydantic models — ChatRequest, ChatResponse, and Source schemas.

nodes.label: streaming.py
nodes.type: Streaming utilities — AnswerStreamExtractor (character-level JSON parser), NDJSON formatting, and content normalization.

metadata.role: Streaming utilities — AnswerStreamExtractor (character-level JSON parser), NDJSON formatting, and content normalization.
metadata.description: Contains AnswerStreamExtractor, a stateful character-level parser that extracts the 'answer' string value from streamed JSON chunks without buffering. Also provides ndjson_event formatting, normalize_stream_content, and normalize_suggestions.

nodes.label: __init__.py
nodes.type: Python package init — Makes src/api/ a Python package.

metadata.role: Python package init — Makes src/api/ a Python package.

nodes.label: RAG Pipeline
nodes.type: feature

metadata.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline for private portfolio data. Ingests markdown files, parses YAML frontmatter metadata, splits into chunks, and indexes into Qdrant with cosine similarity. The search_portfolio tool wraps this service for agent access.

nodes.label: rag_service.py
nodes.type: RAG service — Document ingestion and semantic similarity search against the Qdrant vector store.

metadata.role: RAG service — Document ingestion and semantic similarity search against the Qdrant vector store.
metadata.description: Manages the full document pipeline: loads markdown files, parses frontmatter metadata, splits into chunks with RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter, and indexes into Qdrant with cosine similarity. Provides similarity_search for querying the vector store.

nodes.label: embedding_service.py
nodes.type: Embedding service — Singleton manager for the OpenAI-compatible embedding model via OpenRouter.

metadata.role: Embedding service — Singleton manager for the OpenAI-compatible embedding model via OpenRouter.

nodes.label: portfolio_tools.py
nodes.type: LangChain tool definitions — search_portfolio (RAG semantic search) and handoff_to_specialist (control transfer signal).

metadata.role: LangChain tool definitions — search_portfolio (RAG semantic search) and handoff_to_specialist (control transfer signal).
metadata.description: Defines two LangChain tools: build_search_tool wraps RAGService.similarity_search with formatted metadata output. handoff_to_specialist is a parameterless signal tool that triggers agent routing in the LangGraph workflow.

nodes.label: __init__.py
nodes.type: Python package init — Makes src/services/ a Python package.

metadata.role: Python package init — Makes src/services/ a Python package.

nodes.label: __init__.py
nodes.type: Python package init — Makes src/tools/ a Python package.

metadata.role: Python package init — Makes src/tools/ a Python package.

nodes.label: External Integrations
nodes.type: infrastructure

metadata.description: Services that interface with external systems via MCP. GitHub catalog normalizes MCP responses from GitHub server. Portfolio catalog builds a lightweight project index from local markdown files. Both catalogs are injected as runtime context into agent system prompts.

nodes.label: github_catalog.py
nodes.type: GitHub catalog service — Normalizes raw GitHub MCP responses into clean Python data structures.

metadata.role: GitHub catalog service — Normalizes raw GitHub MCP responses into clean Python data structures.

nodes.label: portfolio_catalog.py
nodes.type: Portfolio catalog service — Parses YAML frontmatter from markdown files and builds a lightweight project catalog.

metadata.role: Portfolio catalog service — Parses YAML frontmatter from markdown files and builds a lightweight project catalog.

nodes.label: Core Infrastructure
nodes.type: infrastructure

metadata.description: Cross-cutting concerns shared across all layers. Configuration via Pydantic BaseSettings loads environment variables for OpenRouter, Qdrant, MCP servers, and LangSmith. Centralized logging provides a shared logger instance.

nodes.label: config.py
nodes.type: Centralized configuration — Pydantic BaseSettings with .env loading for all external services.

metadata.role: Centralized configuration — Pydantic BaseSettings with .env loading for all external services.

nodes.label: logging.py
nodes.type: Logging setup — Centralized 'agenticfolio' logger with stdout handler.

metadata.role: Logging setup — Centralized 'agenticfolio' logger with stdout handler.

metadata.role: Python package init — Makes src/ a Python package.
